name: logistics operations directors managing fleets of 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For logistics operations directors managing fleets of 10-50 vehicles, inefficient fuel consumption tracking causes unexpected costs. We monitor fuel consumption and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: logistics operations directors managing fleets of 10-50 vehicles
problem_solved: inefficient fuel consumption tracking leading to unexpected costs
